zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bonville於1371年出生在英國戴文書特時，他的父親Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff39歲，母親Margaret d'Aumarle28歲。他於大約1392年與Elizabeth FitzRoger在英國薩默塞特修頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1396年10月21日在他的家鄉享年25歲，埋葬在英國戴文阿可明斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Bonville于1371年出生在英国戴文書特时，他的父亲Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff39岁，母亲Margaret d'Aumarle28岁。他于大约1392年与Elizabeth FitzRoger在英国薩默塞特修頓结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1396年10月21日在他的家乡享年25岁，埋葬在英国戴文阿可明斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bonville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: variant of   Bonneville   and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this.

variants.name: Bonneville
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Francois, Liette, Normand, Pierre.
French: habitational name from any of numerous places called Bonneville, from Old French bonne ‘good’ + ville ‘settlement’. Compare Bonville .
Altered form of French Bonnevialle: habitational name from Bonnevialle in the central part of France.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bonville was born in 1371, in Shute, Devon, England, his father, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, was 39 and his mother, Margaret d'Aumarle, was 28. He married Elizabeth FitzRoger about 1392, in Chewton, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 21 October 1396, in his hometown, at the age of 25, and was buried in Axminster, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bonville est né en 1371, à Shute, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Aumarle, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth FitzRoger environ 1392, à Chewton, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1396, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterré à Axminster, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Bonville 1371 in Shute, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff 39 und seine Mutter Margaret d'Aumarle 28. Er hat um 1392 in Chewton, Somerset, England Elizabeth FitzRoger geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1396 im Alter von 25 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Axminster, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bonville è nato il nel 1371 nel Shute, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret d'Aumarle, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth FitzRoger circa 1392, nel Chewton, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 ottobre 1396, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolto a Axminster, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Bonvilleが1371年にイギリスデボンシュトで生まれた時，父Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriffは39歳，母Margaret d'Aumarleは28歳であった。約1392年にイギリスソメルセトチェウトンでElizabeth FitzRogerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1396年10月21日に故郷で25歳で死去し，イギリスデボンアクスミンスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bonville(이)가 1371년 영국 데폰 슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret d'Aumarle(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1392년 영국 서머세트 체w턴에서 Elizabeth FitzRoger(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1396년 10월 21일 그의 고향에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 액민스터에 묻혔다.

mn.Shute, Axminster, Devon, England: Shute, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Bonville nasceu em 1371, em Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret d'Aumarle, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth FitzRoger aproximadamente 1392, em Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1396, em sua cidade natal, com 25 anos, e foi sepultado em Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bonville родился в 1371 г. в местности шут, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Aumarle, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth FitzRoger около 1392 г. в местности чютон, сомирсет, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 21 октября 1396 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 25 лет и был похоронен в местности аксминстир, девон, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Bonville nació en 1371, en Shute, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William Bonville ,MP, Sheriff, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret d'Aumarle, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Elizabeth FitzRoger aproximadamente 1392, en Chewton, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1396, en su pueblo, a la edad de 25 años, y fue sepultado en Axminster, Devon, Inglaterra.
